slides.title: Collagen needs a *hidden cofactor*.
slides.sub: Your body can't build collagen without vitamin C. Take them together and you may better support skin, joints, and tendons.

slides.title: Collagen alone falls short
slides.body: Collagen peptides give your body the raw material — but raw material *isn't the whole story*.

slides.title: Vitamin C is required
slides.body: Vitamin C is the *cofactor for collagen synthesis* — without it, the enzymes that assemble collagen stall.

slides.title: Pair them together
slides.body: Take collagen with a *vitamin C source* — citrus, berries, or peppers — so your body can actually use it.

slides.title: Skin, joints, tendons
slides.body: Together they may support *skin elasticity and joints* — plus the tendons that keep you training pain-free.

slides.title: Give it weeks
slides.body: This isn't overnight — most studies ran *8 to 12 weeks* before measuring changes. Consistency beats dose.

slides.title: Support skin and joints *the smart way*.
slides.body: Vibe Health lets you log supplements and meals, then tracks them on a trend line — so you can stay consistent for the weeks it takes.

caption:
Taking collagen but seeing nothing? You might be missing its cofactor. ✨

Your body can't assemble collagen without vitamin C — so pair your peptides with citrus, berries, or peppers. Give it 8 to 12 weeks and stay consistent. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health helps you log supplements and stay consistent on a trend line → link in bio.
